KS_MD.note: Current site (ksbha.ks.gov) sits behind a state-level bot wall that rejects automated collection. Archived 2023-24 minutes/agendas were recovered from the Internet Archive and are in the library; CURRENT minutes need either a records request or a hand download from the live site.

KY_MD.note: KBML publishes no meeting minutes or agendas anywhere (re-verified 2026-07-02: no minutes category in its document search, none in sitemap). It DOES publish monthly Board Action Reports, quarterly newsletters, and an annual report at kbml.ky.gov. Actual minutes require an open-records request.

WV_DO.note: Board site is wvbdosteo.org (bdosteo.wv.gov no longer resolves). Minutes page exists but has not been updated since May 2019, though SOS open-meetings filings confirm the board meets regularly through June 2026. Board Orders library is current. Minutes require a records request (board contact: Jamie Frame, Jamie.C.Frame@wv.gov, 304-558-6095).
